---
title: "UFW Docker"
description: "Fix Docker and UFW security flaw — automatically manages UFW firewall rules for Docker containers so published ports respect UFW policies instead of bypassing them via iptables"
---

# UFW Docker

Fix Docker and UFW security flaw — automatically manages UFW firewall rules for Docker containers so published ports respect UFW policies instead of bypassing them via iptables
